name: blissful-infra
description: Infrastructure that thinks for itself. Ship fast. Break nothing. Learn everything.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/dashboard
scripts.build:cli: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/cli
scripts.build:dashboard: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/cli
scripts.test:integration: npm run build:cli && npm run test:integration -w packages/cli
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:integration
